digest.component_or_area: impact_code pass-2 impact model (code-review maint lane)
propositions: The impact_code maint lane cannot express a finding where a change introduces or unmasks a reachable code path with no automated test coverage, so such findings score impact 0.0 and no threshold can catch them.

A new abstain-safe bool consequence binary reachable_path_without_automated_coverage is added to _CODE_MAINT_BINARIES at tier moderate (0.6), plus the verify severity model and the code-review-verify.md maintainability lane.
Per ADR 0036 the formula change requires bumping IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION from code-v2 to code-v3 in sidecar.py, with the version-pinning test updated accordingly.
A #529-shaped finding must replay to impact > 0 under code-v3, while code-v2 impact of binary-absent sidecars remains byte-unchanged (0 contribution when absent).
Test fixtures gain a HIGH-labeled row exercising the new binary through the A/B impact-model gate.
